# UI Contract: Add Task
<!-- Generated by /speckit.plan                                      -->
<!-- The testID mapping is the contract between implementation       -->
<!-- and Maestro E2E flows. Every testID here MUST exist at runtime. -->

---

## Screen: Main Task List (`app/index.tsx`)

### Input Area (top of screen)

| testID | Element Type | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `task_input` | `TextInput` | User types the task title here. Placeholder: "What needs to be done?" |
| `add_button` | `TouchableOpacity` | Tapping submits the typed text as a new task. Label: "+" |

### Task List (`FlatList`)

| testID | Element Type | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `task_list` | `FlatList` | Container for all task rows. |
| `task_row_{id}` | `View` | Single task row. `{id}` is the task's UUID — unique per row. |
| `task_checkbox` | `TouchableOpacity` | Unchecked checkbox icon. Inside each `task_row`. |

### Interaction Rules

1. Every `TouchableOpacity` and `TextInput` MUST have a `testID`.
2. `testID` values are `snake_case` only.
3. Task rows use UUID-keyed testIDs: `task_row_{task.id}`.
4. Checkboxes use a base name (`task_checkbox`) with Maestro `index:` for Nth-element selection.
5. Text assertions use `assertVisible: "exact text"` — never use text for taps if a testID is available.
